blocks.text: Norwegian stars rain, Hovland and Ruud all in action Thursday

Thursday delivers a three-way Norwegian showcase: rain hunts CS2 Major glory in Rio, Hovland opens at RBC Heritage on a post-Masters charge, and Ruud grinds clay in Barcelona. Three stars, three storylines worth following.
rain battles on at IEM Rio 2026 CS2 Major — Norwegian legend Håvard Nygaard in Major title contention
Hovland tees off at RBC Heritage, Hilton Head — strong post-Masters field, Viktor primed on Hilton Head turf
Casper Ruud continues at Barcelona Open — clay courts suit him perfectly, deep run firmly on the cards
